articles.description: All the talk has been about Arsenal's Premier League title challenge - but is this now the Gunners' time to conquer Europe?
articles.title: Arsenal 1-0 Atletico Madrid (2-1 agg): Is this Gunners' time to win Champions League?

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka believes players will boycott a Grand Slam "at some point" because of the ongoing dispute over prize money.
articles.title: Players v Grand Slams: Aryna Sabalenka says top players will boycott a major 'at some point' over prize money

articles.description: Bayern Munich's attack of Harry Kane, Luis Diaz and Michael Olise has hit 100 goals this season. With the second leg of the Champions League semi-final with PSG coming up, BBC Sport compares the two front threes.
articles.title: Bayern Munich v PSG: are Harry Kane, Luis Diaz and Michael Olise the best front three?

articles.description: Wessel Nijman emulates his Michael van Gerwen as he continues his superb form in the Players Championship with victory in the 14th tournament of the year.
articles.title: Players Championship 14: Wessel Nijman emulates Michael van Gerwen with fifth tour victory

articles.description: The UK government says it is in "discussions about supporting potential bids" to host the Olympics and Paralympics in the 2040s.
articles.title: Olympic Games bid: UK government discusses hosting Olympics in 2040s

articles.description: Jon Rahm will be eligible for next year's Ryder Cup in Ireland after striking a deal to continue playing on the DP World Tour.
articles.title: Jon Rahm eligible for Ryder Cup after striking DP World Tour deal

articles.description: England fly-half Zoe Harrison says the introduction of smaller balls for this autumn's WXV Global Series is "the worst decision someone has ever made".
articles.title: Zoe Harrison: Red Roses fly-half says smaller balls for WXV is 'worst decision ever'

articles.description: Wales full-back Leigh Halfpenny will leave a lasting legacy after announcing he will hang up his boots at the end of the season.
articles.title: Leigh Halfpenny: The unassuming Welsh rugby great who has hung up his boots

articles.description: Britain's Emma Raducanu withdraws from the Italian Open because of the post-viral illness that has kept her off the WTA Tour for two months.
articles.title: Italian Open: Emma Raducanu withdraws with post-viral illness shortly after media conference

articles.description: Wu Yize discusses the sacrifices made by his family on his journey to becoming China's second world snooker champion.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026: Wu Yize on family sacrifices that helped him become world champion
